CustomField.description: The last date when our recruitment consultant approved. If the review status is 'Finalised - Approved', this field indicates the date when this document pack has been finalised.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The last date when our recruitment consultant approved. If the review status is 'Finalised - Approved', this field indicates the date when this document pack has been finalised.
CustomField.label: Last Approval Date
